name: Chocolate Cheesecake with Chocolate Wafer Crust
recipeIngredient: Cream cheese, softened (4 packages, 3 oz each)
Sugar (to taste, up to double the amount)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the chocolate wafers and mix with melted butter until crumbly.
2. Press the dough into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
4. Melt the butter in a double boiler over hot water.
5. Add the chocolates and stir until melted and smooth.
6. Beat the cream cheese until creamy.
7. Mix in vanilla, whipping cream, and chocolate mixture.
8. Gradually beat eggs with sugar into the chocolate mixture.
9. Pour the batter into the crust.
10. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until the cake puffs slightly in the center.
11. Allow the cake to cool completely before refrigerating.
12. Unmold the cake and serve with whipped cream, if desired.
